# BharatTesting.com

> India's primary platform for generating, validating, and transforming India-specific test data. Optimized for QA Engineers, Manual Testers, and Developers. 100% offline and privacy-first.

## API Base URL
- Base URL: https://api.bharattesting.com/v1
- OpenAPI Spec: https://api.bharattesting.com/v1/openapi.json
- MCP Server: https://api.bharattesting.com/mcp

## Key Capabilities
- **Aadhaar Generator**: Valid 12-digit numbers with Verhoeff checksum.
- **PAN Generator**: Entity-aware (Individual, Company, Trust) Permanent Account Numbers.
- **GSTIN Generator**: State-aware Goods and Services Tax Identification Numbers with Mod-36 checksum.
- **Indian Data Faker**: Generate profiles including Names (regional), Phone numbers (+91), UPI IDs, and Addresses with valid PIN codes.
- **Utility Tools**: Image Size Reducer, PDF Merger, and Intelligent JSON/CSV/YAML Repair.

## Data Formats
All generators support:
- JSON (default)
- CSV
- XML
- SQL INSERT

## Privacy & Security
- 100% Client-side processing for UI.
- No PII (Personally Identifiable Information) is ever stored or logged.
- Generated data is synthetic but structurally valid.
